wikitext.*:
=====[[Pokémon World Tournament]]=====
Winona uses three of these Pokémon in [[Pokémon battle|Single Battles]], four in [[Double Battle|Double]] and [[Rotation Battle]]s, and all six in [[Triple Battle]]s. Winona always leads with her signature Pokémon, {{TP|Winona|Altaria}}.
